ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that generated the reading */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "value" REAL /* The actual sensor reading value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor reading */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reading (e.g., normal, warning, error) */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., online, offline, maintenance) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the reading was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor in the facility */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the sensor needs to be calibrated */,
  "last_calibrated" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sensor is installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., serial number, calibration date) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., technical, operational) */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_metadata_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., trigger, alert) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the event is related to */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine the event is related to */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "handled_by" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who handled the event */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time it took to resolve the event (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_events_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_events_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system state */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine the state belongs to */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the machine (e.g., running, idle) */,
  "state_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the state */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who changed the state */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the state change */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration the machine was in the given state (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_states_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_states_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "machine_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine (e.g., conveyor, packaging) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the machine in the facility */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the machine was installed */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date the machine was last maintained */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* Date the next maintenance is due */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the machine */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the machine */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the machine is installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., serial number, calibration date) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., technical, operational) */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_metadata_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, locked, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout, configuration change) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration setting (e.g., threshold, interval) */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration setting was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_config_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
